snippet.title: Atlanta Braves at Philadelphia Phillies
snippet.description: The Atlanta Braves and the Philadelphia Phillies conclude a three-game weekend series at Citizens Bank Park. This early-season National League East clash features the division-leading Braves against a Phillies squad looking to close the gap.

snippet.title: Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER GEKITOU Trailer
snippet.description:
The SUPER Brawl between Goku and Beerus!
At the end, Frieza is seen awaiting his resurrection ――

Series Premieres in Fall of 2026!
The anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus in Fall 2026!

#dragonball #dragonballsuper

◾️Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER Launch Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOmRInABehI

◾️INTRODUCTION
The globally beloved manga DRAGON BALL by Akira Toriyama continues to captivate fans through a wide range of media—from TV animation, movies, games, and merchandising—standing as a top-ranked title with extraordinary worldwide popularity. 
Now, in 2026, the anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus! This ENHANCED edition introduces a large volume of newly added and redrawn cuts, as well as a reconstructed narrative. With cutting-edge visual expression, the series delivers even more immersive battle scenes and a more faithful representation of the original manga—bringing an ENHANCED edition to life like never before.

Several years have passed since the fierce battle against Majin Buu, and Earth has finally regained a brief moment of peace. At the same time, Beerus, the God of Destruction, awakens from his long, deep sleep. Even Kai and Supreme Kai, aware of Beerus’s overwhelming power to destroy entire planets, watch his awakening with great fear… Meanwhile, Beerus hears rumors of a Saiyan who defeated Frieza—and suddenly appears before Goku.
Targeted by Beerus, the strongest being in the universe, Earth is in grave danger. Thus begins an Earth-shattering cosmic battle between the God of Destruction and Goku and his allies—a conflict that will shake the entire universe.

Original Work, Story & Character Design: Akira Toriyama
 
■Dragon Ball Super: Beerus Official Website     https://dragonball-super.com/en/
■Anime Dragon Ball Official X　               　       https://x.com/DB_anime_info
■DRAGON BALL Official Website           　          https://en.dragon-ball-official.com/
■DRAGON BALL Official X           　           　       https://x.com/DB_official_en

©BIRD STUDIO/SHUEISHA, TOEI ANIMATION

snippet.title: AVENGERS DOOMSDAY TRAILER: Doctor Doom & X-Men Breakdown
snippet.description:
Avengers Doomsday Trailer Cinemacon. Doctor Doom vs X-Men, Thor vs Doctor Doom, Steve Rogers Captain America Reunites with Thor, New Avengers, Fanastic Four & Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
Avengers Doomsday CinemaCon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dDrWFxkhCuA&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Spider-Man Brand New Day Cinemacon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XnbV1nunjzk&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&&pp=iAQBsAgC
The Boys Season 5 Episode 3 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NgPvY6XxAl0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczzDVHUrq_EeqCBhLjzXfKlR&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Black Panther 3 Teaser https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fSeWKgXDVS0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Masters Of The Universe Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W5JZ-oq-T7s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Invincible Season 4 Episode 6 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lP4qxaBps18&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxJXJRwmzIBW9nsgB9Qu_lc&index=1&pp=iAQB0gcJCdoKAYcqIYzvsAgC
Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPkbV4TVQ3A&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Daredevil Born Again Season 2 Episode 4 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YiJMrLE-8S4&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&t=0s&pp=iAQBsAgC
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VLAKfS3RlB0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=3&pp=iAQBsAgC 
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering new Avengers Doomsday Trailer Breakdown and Easter Eggs. X-Men vs Avengers, Thor vs Doctor Doom, more new footage. New Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer connection, other versions of Spider-Man, Tobey Maguire, Black Panther, The Fantastic Four, Namor, Wakanda Characters. X-Men Return, Cyclops Scene Explained, Patrick Stewart Professor X & Magneto Scene. X-Men vs Doctor Doom Scene Explained. Spider-Man Brand New Day Sadie Sink Jean Grey Changes.

Steve Rogers Returns, Avengers Endgame Post Credit Scene. Steve Rogers Children Explained. Teams Preview, New Avengers, Tobey Maguire Spider-Man, Wolverine, Kelsey Grammer Beast. Why Tobey Maguire seems like he's replacing Tom Holland Spider-Man in Avengers Doomsday. Sadie Sink Avengers Secret Wars Announcement. Shang Chi, Black Panther characters. Chris Evans Steve Rogers & Peggy Carter.

Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer, Bruce Banner Savage Hulk, Sadie Sink New Character, Spider-Man vs Punisher. Tom Holland and Jon Bernthal reunion. New Spider-Man Suit First Look. Hulk Announcement. Why Bruce Banner would help Spider-Man, Spider-Man vs Hulk, Spider-Man Movies previous references to The Hulk. Stan Lee Incredible Hulk and Spider-Man Live Action Crossover in the 1980s. The Scorpion Returns, Tombstone, other new villains.

New Black Panther, X-Men, Doctor Strange, Avengers Secret Wars Battleworld MCU. Fantastic Four, Franklin Richards. Ian McKellen Magneto, Patrick Stewart Professor X, Kesley Grammer Beast, Thor Returns, Mystique, Cyclops, Nightcrawler, Original X-Men.

Lots more Marvel Trailers coming Avengers Doomsday Trailers, More Spider-Man Brand New Day videos coming soon!

My Full Daredevil Born Again Season 2 Episode 5 video posting tues night! My video for The Boys Season 5 Episode 4 posting after that. And my Full Invincible Season 4 Episode 8 Finale video will post wed!
